nasb.text: “You shall therefore love the Lord your God, and always keep His charge, His statutes, His ordinances, and His commandments.

esv.text: “You shall therefore love the Lord your God and keep his charge, his statutes, his rules, and his commandments always.

cnv.text: “所以你要愛耶和華你的　神，常常遵守他的吩咐、律例、典章和誡命。

ccb.text: “你们要爱你们的上帝耶和华，时刻遵守祂的吩咐、律例、典章和诫命。
